plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.cardBody: EX Holon Phantoms crown jewel. The card the whole set chases.
brief.craftBody: A bright starburst bloom anchors the upper-left, painted in soft whites and color flecks. It reads as a distant nebula.
brief.sceneBody: Fukuda renders Mewtwo mid-levitation against a deep-space backdrop. The foil layer makes the starfield shift with every tilt.
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 214 to 1.

vision.subject: Mewtwo Star floating in a cosmic starfield, arms extended
vision.sceneBody: Masakazu Fukuda renders Mewtwo mid-levitation against a deep-space backdrop | the holographic foil layer makes the starfield shift with every tilt of the card.
vision.craftBody: A bright starburst bloom anchors the upper-left corner, painted in soft whites and scattered color flecks | it reads as a distant nebula and grounds Mewtwo's pose in deep space.
